title: 16pcs Baby Bath Toys Set with 10 Bath Squirt Toys, 1 Net, 1 bath toy storage net bag, 4 play balls, Baby Bath Tub Toys Paddling Pool Toys Water Toys for Toddler Kids Girls Boys Bath-time Shower Gifts
features: 【Include】1 Fishing Net, 1 bath toy storage net bag, 4 play balls, 10 Squirt Bathing Toys

【Non Toxic Safe Material】 Our baby bath toys are made of high grade non-toxic BPA free plastic that is 100% safe for the little ones! Our water toys have no unpleasant odor, no mould breeds, with bright colors painted, the paint does not come off, very good quality for your boys and girls.

【Enjoy Bath Time】 Various shapes of sea animals toys for kids will attract children's attention, each toy also has a water spray function, so that children no longer hate bathing, but also want to explore the marine world, bath time will become very joy.
【Perfect Size】Our paddling pool toys are the perfect size for little hands, easy to fill, hold and spray water.

【Gift for Babies】Bath toys for 1 year old, can be used in the bathtub, swimming pool, shower, also can be used outdoors and at the beach. The perfect gift for Christmas, birthdays and holidays for boys and girls. It is also a great gift to enhance the relationship between parent and child.
description: Product Description Make Bath Time Fun! Now, let's make your little one fall in love with bath time. Our bath toys are colorful, cute, and have a water spray function. In addition, there are play balls, fishing Net, and many ways to play. There is always one that your baby will love! All-in-One Bath Toy Set This bath toy set includes 1 Fishing Net, 1 bath toy storage net bag, 4 play balls, 10 Squirt Bathing Toys. With this complete set, you won’t need to buy anything else, as it meets all your baby's bathing needs. Loved By Mums, Approved By Babies Delight your little ones with these engaging product! Designed to captivate and entertain, they make bath time or playtime in the pool a favorite activity for babies and kids alike Kids' favorite fish-catching game Not only do our bath toys include water-squirting animals, but they also come with a fishing net, perfect for the kids' favorite fish-catching game! Gift for Babies Bath toys for babies, can be used in the bathtub, swimming pool, shower, also can be used outdoors and at the beach. The perfect gift for Christmas, birthdays and holidays for boys and girls. It is also a great gift to enhance the relationship between parent and child. See More
